questions.prompt: Simplest way to use HF model?

choices.text: pipeline() function. One-line; handles tokenization + model + decoding. Tasks: text-generation, sentiment, summarization, QA, NER, image, audio, etc. Lower-level API (AutoTokenizer + AutoModelFor[Task]) for custom control.

questions.prompt: AutoModel class for text generation / chat?

choices.text: AutoModelForCausalLM. Causal language modeling = next-token prediction = GPT-style autoregressive generation. For Llama / Mistral / Qwen / Phi instruct models. Other variants: SequenceClassification, TokenClassification, QA, Seq2SeqLM, ImageClassification.

questions.explanation: AutoModelForCausalLM for text generation / chat models.

choices.text: Cloud API. Fastest start; no setup; latest models. HF Inference API free tier; Replicate; Together; Fireworks; Groq for speed. Switch to local after validation if cost/privacy/volume justify.

questions.explanation: Cloud API. Faster start; latest models. Switch to local for production high-volume.

choices.text: ~140 GB. 2 GB/B params FP16. INT8 = 70 GB; INT4 = 35 GB. Consumer GPU = use 8B model or aggressive quantization.
vLLM or TensorRT-LLM with continuous batching + PagedAttention. 5-20x throughput vs. naive Transformers. Combine with AWQ quantization + Flash Attention. Production standard 2026.

questions.explanation: vLLM / TensorRT-LLM. Continuous batching + PagedAttention. 5-20x throughput.
